description.zh-cn: 套装组合销售：配置「指定商品组合 + 套装价」，当购物车包含套装内全部商品(满足数量)时，自动以负向费用项抵扣差价(原价合计 - 套装价)，结算实时生效。支持多套装、启用开关。
description.en: Bundle deals: define a set of products with a bundle price; when the cart contains all bundle items (meeting quantities), the price gap (normal total - bundle price) is auto-applied as a discount fee at checkout. Supports multiple bundles and an on/off switch.
